ddls:
CREATE TABLE "creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the creator */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the creator */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the creator */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the creator */,
  "portrait_url" TEXT /* URL of the creator's portrait */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repository_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository or library */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the repository */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the repository */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'admin', 'researcher', 'guest') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_documents" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the documents table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., 'lead', 'contributor') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., 'document usage', 'research trends') */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the reports table */,
  "data_key" TEXT /* Key for the data (e.g., 'document ID', 'user ID') */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value for the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "data_key")
)
